title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast discusses Anthropic's new Claude model and its tier routing system, Apple's partnership with NVIDIA for cloud AI at WWDC 2026, and whether AI models can detect sarcasm. Hosted by Tim Hwang with experts Christopher Hay, Kaoutar El Maghraoui, and Volkmar Uhlig.
writeup: This episode of IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast, hosted by Tim Hwang with Christopher Hay, Kaoutar El Maghraoui, and Volkmar Uhlig, covers three topics: Anthropic's new Claude model and its tier routing system, Apple's partnership with NVIDIA for cloud AI announced at WWDC 2026, and whether AI models can detect sarcasm. The discussion spans routing, multimodal learning, emotion detection, and cloud integration. The panel format weighs each development through the perspectives of the assembled experts.
